message:
perf(vector): P1 Opt 3 - Parallel vector search with Rayon

Implements parallel vector search using Rayon's par_chunks for large
indices (>10k vectors). Each chunk maintains a thread-local top-k heap
to avoid contention, then results are merged into the final top-k.

Changes:
- Add PARALLEL_THRESHOLD (10k) and PARALLEL_CHUNK_SIZE (1024) constants
- Add CASS_PARALLEL_SEARCH env var for rollback (default: enabled)
- Add search_top_k_parallel method with thread-local heaps
- Refactor search_top_k to dispatch between sequential/parallel
- Add tests verifying parallel results match sequential

Benchmark results (50k F16 vectors, loaded from disk):
- Before (Opt 1 + Opt 2): 6.75ms
- After (Opt 1 + Opt 2 + Opt 3): 3.33ms
- Parallel speedup: ~2x additional

Combined speedup from all optimizations:
- Baseline (F16 mmap): ~97ms
- After all optimizations: ~3.3ms
- Total speedup: ~29x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
